In [1]:
import numpy as np                      #for numerical computation
import pandas as pd                     #for data analysis and data manipulation
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt         #for data visualization
import seaborn as sns                   #for data visualization
import tensorflow as tf                 #for machine learning and deep neural network
In [2]:
#Create Synthetic Dataset
from sklearn import datasets
features, response = datasets.make_blobs(n_samples = [200, 200, 200, 200],
                                        n_features = 4,
                                        centers = [(6, 40),(4, 50), (6, 55), (4, 65)],
                                        cluster_std = 3.5, random_state = 123)

In [5]:
#Plot Data
cdict = {0: 'red', 1: 'blue', 2: 'yellow', 3: 'green'}
plt.figure(figsize = (6, 6))
for i in np.unique(response):
    indices = np.where(response == i)
    plt.scatter(x = features[indices, 0], y = features[indices, 1], c = cdict[i],
                label = i, marker = "o", alpha = 0.7)
plt.legend()

from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
#Initialize the scaler
scaler = StandardScaler()
# fit Scaler on features
features_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(features)

In [13]:
#Import Keras
from tensorflow import keras
In [14]:
#Shallow Network Function
def shallow_network(X, y, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid',
                    epochs = 250, batch_size = 32, mean_weight_init = 0, sd_weight_init = 0.01):
    #Define the Model Architecture
    model = keras.Sequential()
    weight_initializer = tf.keras.initializers.RandomNormal(mean = mean_weight_init, stddev = sd_weight_init)
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(4, activation = activation_func, input_dim = n_features, kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(1, activation = 'sigmoid', kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))

    #Configure the model
    model.compile(optimizer = opt, loss = 'binary_crossentropy', metrics = ['accuracy'])

    #Train the model
    history = model.fit(X, y, epochs = epochs, batch_size = batch_size, validation_split = 0.3, verbose = 1)
    return(history)
In [15]:
#Model 1: Shallow Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.1) #learning rate
model1 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 250, batch_size = 32)

In [61]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model1.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model1.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 1: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
Out[61]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 1: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
In [62]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model1.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model1.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 1: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
Out[62]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 1: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')

#Model 2: Shallow Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 50...
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.1) #learning rate
model2 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 500, batch_size = 16)

In [21]:
# Extract the actual model from the history object and save it
model2.model.save('my_model2.keras')
In [63]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model2.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model2.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 2: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[63]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 2: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [64]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model2.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model2.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 2: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[64]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 2: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [24]:
#Model 3: Shallow Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 50...
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.3) #learning rate
model3 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 500, batch_size = 16)
#Note: This model is not robust (each time you run it, you can get significantly different results)

In [65]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model3.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model3.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 3: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[65]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 3: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [66]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model3.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model3.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 3: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[66]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 3: Shallow Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [27]:
#Model 4: Shallow Network/ReLU Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Bat...
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.1) #learning rate
model4 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'relu', epochs = 250, batch_size = 32)

Epoch 1/250

#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model4.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model4.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 4: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')

Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 4: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
In [68]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model4.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model4.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 4: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
Out[68]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 4: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
In [30]:
#Deep Network Function
def deep_network(X, y, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid',
                 epochs = 250, batch_size = 32, mean_weight_init = 0, sd_weight_init = 0.01):
    #Define the Model Architecture
    model = keras.Sequential()
    weight_initializer = tf.keras.initializers.RandomNormal(mean = mean_weight_init, stddev = sd_weight_init)

    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(4, activation = activation_func, input_dim = n_features, kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))   #Layer 1
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(4, activation = activation_func, kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))   #Layer 2
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(4, activation = activation_func, kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))   #Layer 3
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(4, activation = activation_func, kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))   #Layer 4
    model.add(keras.layers.Dense(1, activation = 'sigmoid', kernel_initializer = weight_initializer))                                 #Output Layer

    #Configure the model
    model.compile(optimizer = opt, loss = 'binary_crossentropy', metrics = ['accuracy'])
    #Train the model
    history = model.fit(X, y, epochs = epochs, batch_size = batch_size, validation_split = 0.3, verbose = 1)
    return(history)
In [31]:
#Model 5: Deep Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 1000/Batch Size = 16
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.3) #learning rate
model5 = deep_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 1000, batch_size = 16)

#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model5.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model5.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 5: Deep Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 1000/Batch Size = 16')
Out[69]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 5: Deep Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 1000/Batch Size = 16')
In [70]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model5.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model5.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 5: Deep Network/Sigmoid\n Learning Rate: 0.3/Scaled Features/Epochs: 1000/Batch Size = 16')

In [71]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model6.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model6.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 6: Deep Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
Out[71]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 6: Deep Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
In [72]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model6.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model6.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 6: Deep Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
Out[72]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 6: Deep Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')

Weight Initialization

In [58]:
#Model 7: Deep Network/ReLU Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16

#Xavier initialization: sigma_2 = 1 / N (N = the number of input neurons to a particular layer) - for Sigmoid and tanh
#He initialization: sigma_2 = 2 / N (N = the number of input neurons to a particular layer) - for ReLU

opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.1) #learning rate
model7 = deep_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'relu',
                      epochs = 250, batch_size = 16, mean_weight_init = 0, sd_weight_init = np.sqrt(2 / 4))

In [73]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model7.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model7.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 7: Deep Network/ReLU (He Init)\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
Out[73]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 7: Deep Network/ReLU (He Init)\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
In [74]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model7.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model7.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 7: Deep Network/ReLU (He Init)\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')
Out[74]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 7: Deep Network/ReLU (He Init)\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Scaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 16')

Scaled vs. Un-scaled Features

In [41]:
#Model 8: Shallow Network/ReLU Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.1/Unscaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32
opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.1) #learning rate
model8 = shallow_network(features, response, opt, activation_func = 'relu', epochs = 250, batch_size = 32)

In [75]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model8.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model8.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 8: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Unscaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
Out[75]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 8: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Unscaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
In [76]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model8.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model8.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 8: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Unscaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')
Out[76]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 8: Shallow Network/ReLU\n Learning Rate: 0.1/Unscaled Features/Epochs: 250/Batch Size = 32')

Analysis of Different Optimization Algorithms

In [47]:
#Different Optimization Algorithms
#https://www.ruder.io/optimizing-gradient-descent/#adam

#SGD
#  x = x - learning_rate * grad(x)

#Momentum Algorithm
#  v = mu * v - learning_rate * grad(x)    mu: between 0.9 and 0.999; "friction" or "dampening" parameter
#  x = x + v

#Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG)
#  v = mu * v - learning_rate * grad(x + mu * v)
#  x = x + v

#Adagrad
#  s_i = s_i + grad(x_i) ** 2
#  x_i = x_i - learning_rate * grad(x_i) / (sqrt(s_i) + eps)

#RMSprop
#  s_i = beta * s_i + (1 - beta) * grad(x_i) ** 2
#  x_i = x_i - learning_rate * grad(x_i) / (sqrt(s_i) + eps)

#Adam
#  v = beta1 * v + (1 - beta1)* dx
#  s = beta2 * s + (1 - beta2) * grad(x) ** 2
#  x = x - learning_rate * v / (np.sqrt(s) + eps)

#Optimization Algorithms Visualization
#  https://bl.ocks.org/EmilienDupont/aaf429be5705b219aaaf8d691e27ca87

#Keras Optimizers
#  https://keras.io/api/optimizers/
In [48]:
#Model 9: Shallow Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16
#SGD w/ Momentum

opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.01, momentum = 0.99) #learning rate
model9 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 500, batch_size = 16)

#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model9.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model9.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 9: Shallow Network/Momentum\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[77]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 9: Shallow Network/Momentum\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [78]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model9.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model9.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 9: Shallow Network/Momentum\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')

In [51]:
#Model 10: Shallow Network/Sigmoid Activation Function/Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16
#Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG)

opt = keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate = 0.01, momentum = 0.99, nesterov = True) #learning rate
model10 = shallow_network(features_scaled, response, opt, activation_func = 'sigmoid', epochs = 500, batch_size = 16)

In [79]:
#Loss - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model10.history['loss'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model10.history['val_loss'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('loss')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Loss - Epochs \n Model 10: Shallow Network/Nesterov\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[79]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Loss - Epochs \n Model 10: Shallow Network/Nesterov\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
In [80]:
#Accuracy - Epochs
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 6))
plt.plot(model10.history['accuracy'], label = 'train')
plt.plot(model10.history['val_accuracy'], alpha = 0.7, label = 'test')
plt.ylabel('accuracy')
plt.xlabel('epoch')
plt.legend(['train', 'test'], loc = 'upper left')
plt.title('Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 10: Shallow Network/Nesterov\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')
Out[80]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Accuracy - Epochs \n Model 10: Shallow Network/Nesterov\n Learning Rate: 0.01/Scaled Features/Epochs: 500/Batch Size = 16')

Visualize the Results

In [52]:
#Visualize the Results

#Data Visualization - Shallow Network (Model 4)
#Plot Data
cdict = {0: 'red', 1: 'blue'}
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 8))
for i in np.unique(response):
    indices = np.where(response == i)
    plt.scatter(x = features[indices, 0], y = features[indices, 1], c = cdict[i],
                label = i, marker = "o", alpha = 0.7)
plt.legend()

#Plot Regions
x1, x2 = np.meshgrid(np.linspace(features[:, 0].min() - 1, features[:, 0].max() + 1, 500),
                     np.linspace(features[:, 1].min() - 1, features[:, 1].max() + 1, 500))

#Scale Features
x1_scaled = (x1 - features[:, 0].mean())/ features[:, 0].std()
x2_scaled = (x2 - features[:, 1].mean())/ features[:, 1].std()

#Grids
grids = np.array((x1_scaled.ravel(), x2_scaled.ravel())).T

#Prediction on Grids
region_pred = model4.model.predict(grids)
region_color = np.where(region_pred >= 0.5, 1, 0)
region_color = region_color.reshape(500, 500)

#Plot
plt.contourf(x1, x2, region_color, alpha = 0.1, levels = [0, 0.5, 1], colors = ['red', 'blue'])
plt.title('Model 4: Shallow Network')

7813/7813 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 8s 1ms/step
Out[52]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Model 4: Shallow Network')
In [55]:
#Prediction on Whole Dataset using Model 4
y_prob = model4.model.predict(features_scaled)
y_pred = np.where(y_prob >= 0.5, 1, 0)

#Accuracy
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score
accuracy_score(response, y_pred) * 100

25/25 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 0s 2ms/step

94.25
In [59]:
#Data Visualization - Deep Network (Model 7)
#Plot Data
cdict = {0: 'red', 1: 'blue'}
plt.figure(figsize = (8, 8))
for i in np.unique(response):
    indices = np.where(response == i)
    plt.scatter(x = features[indices, 0], y = features[indices, 1], c = cdict[i],
                label = i, marker = "o", alpha = 0.7)
plt.legend()

#Plot Regions
x1, x2 = np.meshgrid(np.linspace(features[:, 0].min() - 1, features[:, 0].max() + 1, 500),
                     np.linspace(features[:, 1].min() - 1, features[:, 1].max() + 1, 500))

#Scale Features
x1_scaled = (x1 - features[:, 0].mean())/ features[:, 0].std()
x2_scaled = (x2 - features[:, 1].mean())/ features[:, 1].std()

#Grids
grids = np.array((x1_scaled.ravel(), x2_scaled.ravel())).T

#Prediction on Grids
region_pred = model7.model.predict(grids)
region_color = np.where(region_pred >= 0.5, 1, 0)
region_color = region_color.reshape(500, 500)

#Plot
plt.contourf(x1, x2, region_color, alpha = 0.1, levels = [0, 0.5, 1], colors = ['red', 'blue'])
plt.title('Model 7: Deep Network')

7813/7813 ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 9s 1ms/step
Out[59]:
Text(0.5, 1.0, 'Model 7: Deep Network')

#Prediction on Whole Dataset using Model 4
y_prob = model7.model.predict(features_scaled)
y_pred = np.where(y_prob >= 0.5, 1, 0)

#Accuracy
from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score
accuracy_score(response, y_pred) * 100
